/usr/bin/ar qc libdash-lib.a "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/ApplicationStarterImp.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/DashController.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/DashView.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/DashViewPrivate.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/FilterAllButton.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/FilterBar.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/FilterBasicButton.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/FilterExpanderLabel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/FilterFactory.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/FilterGenreButton.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/FilterGenreWidget.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/FilterMultiRangeButton.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/FilterMultiRangeWidget.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/FilterRatingsButton.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/FilterRatingsWidget.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/ScopeBar.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/ScopeBarIcon.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/ScopeView.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/PlacesGroup.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/PreviewStateMachine.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/ResultRenderer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/ResultRendererHorizontalTile.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/ResultRendererTile.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/ResultView.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dash-lib.dir/ResultViewGrid.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libdash-lib.a
